title: stdin: on HUP, read everything
body: When we're polling to handle stdio for a container, when we detect a HUP on our stdin, read all that we can from stdin before closing it, instead of reading only, at most, a single chunk of bytes.

comments.body: LGTM once questions are answered or addressed.
